case_title: HANSEN, EGIDIE MARIE VS FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE C/O DOUGH LITTLE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HANSEN, EGIDIE MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE C/O DOUGH LITTLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANSEN, EGIDIE MARIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE C/O DOUGH LITTLE JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT.
